findings.title: Mission-close bundle excludes completed installer specs
findings.rationale: The current mission-close bundle asserts cross-spec claims for setup/init, global backups, doctor/restore, review-lane coverage, and writeback authority, but its included_spec_refs contains only reviewer_writeback_authority_enforcement. The blueprint still lists the earlier installer workstreams as in-scope and blocking, and their specs remain active/complete, but load_mission_close_spec_ids filters included specs to the current blueprint revision. As a result, validate-review-bundle can return valid while mission_close_eligibility_findings only checks the latest authority spec and skips the completed setup/init, backup, doctor/restore, and lane-guard specs that prove most of the locked installer outcome.
findings.suggested_next_action: Make mission-close inclusion cover every active non-descoped mission spec that remains part of the current blueprint outcome, or explicitly roll prior completed specs forward/descoped with reviewable truth; then regenerate the mission-close bundle and require eligibility checks over all installer specs before terminal close.

findings.title: Mission-close clean review has no enforced code/correctness reviewer lane
findings.rationale: The mission-close bundle carries the correctness lens and claims P6/P7, but mission-close bundle construction forces proof_rows_under_review, receipts, changed_files_or_diff, and touched_interface_contracts to empty. The clean-review lane guard derives required code/spec reviewer lanes only when changed_files_or_diff looks code-producing, so a clean mission-close outcome for this bundle has an empty required lane set even though it is closing over code-changing work and authority-boundary claims. This leaves the P6 lane-coverage promise dependent on parent discipline rather than machine enforcement at the final close boundary.
findings.suggested_next_action: Define required reviewer-output profiles for mission-close bundles directly from mandatory lenses/cross-spec claims or included specs instead of changed_files_or_diff alone, and add a regression proving a mission-close bundle with correctness/authority claims cannot be recorded clean without the required durable reviewer-output lanes.
